result.reason: MySqlCommandBuilder throws KeyNotFoundException when column names clash with MySQL reserved words during DataAdapter.Update; fix by setting QuotePrefix/QuoteSuffix backtick quoting on the builder.
result.approach: Set cb.QuotePrefix = "`" and cb.QuoteSuffix = "`" on the MySqlCommandBuilder instance before calling GetUpdateCommand/GetDeleteCommand/GetInsertCommand so column names are properly quoted and the internal parameter-to-column dictionary lookup succeeds.
